# Pinned dependencies for process_survey_data.py (Update Survey Data workflow).
#
# Versions below are what pip resolves on Python 3.9 (the version this workflow
# uses) and match the currently-passing scheduled runs. Verified locally that
# gspread 6.x still accepts the script's oauth2client ServiceAccountCredentials
# via its convert_credentials() shim, so no downgrade is needed.
#
# (openai and python-dotenv were previously installed but are not imported by
# the script — the Groq API is called directly via requests — so they are
# omitted here.)
pandas==2.3.3
gspread==6.2.1
oauth2client==4.1.3
requests==2.32.5
pytz==2026.2
